ensures.text: CountChar(s + [c], d) == CountChar(s, d) + if c == d then 1 else 0

j == i % k ==> ExactCount(i + 1, k, j) == ExactCount(i, k, j) + 1
j != i % k ==> ExactCount(i + 1, k, j) == ExactCount(i, k, j)

invariants.text: forall m: int {:trigger s[m]} | 0 <= m < i :: s[m] == ('a' as int + m % k) as char

forall j: int {:trigger ExactCount(i, k, j)} | 0 <= j < k :: CountChar(s, ('a' as int + j) as char) == ExactCount(i, k, j)
